heading: Assignment of personnel as instructors
label: 1947 Assignment of personnel as instructors
text: The Commandant may assign any member to appropriate instruction duty at the Academy.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 15i (, ).Apr. 16, 1937, ch. 107, § 850 Stat. 67Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 192 of this title1984— substituted reference to member for reference to commissioned officer, warrant officer, and enlisted man.Pub. L. 98–557
